guide.short: A lightweight classroom spreadsheet tool for tracking grades, scores, attendance, or vocabulary.
steps: Double-click any cell to enter text, numbers, or standard math formulas starting with '='.
Style cells using bold, italics, text alignment, and brand-aligned background highlights.
Use ready-to-go templates like 'Grade Tracker', 'Scoreboard', 'Attendance Tracker', or 'Vocab Bingo Grid'.
Export your worksheets to CSV for spreadsheets or import existing rosters instantly.

guide.short: Stay ahead of your workload with a sleek, personalized task management system.
steps: Quick-add tasks by typing and pressing Enter.
Organize by Priority and Type to focus on what matters most.
Check off completed tasks with satisfying visual feedback.
Securely export your task list as JSON for backup and portability.

guide.short: Master your schedule with drag-and-drop planning and integrated task tracking.
steps: Effortlessly drag event templates onto your weekly calendar grid.
Customize every detail: names, colors, and specific session types.
Use built-in checklists to ensure every lesson and admin task is prepped.
Smoothly navigate across your entire term with intuitive header controls.

guide.short: A comprehensive hub for student success tracking and pedagogical reflection.
steps: Select a class from your schedule to enter the dedicated management view.
Onboard students and track individual progress milestones in real-time.
Document professional reflections to refine your teaching strategies.
Generate visual progress reports and manage attendance with a single click.

guide.short: Explore, save, and integrate curated classroom activities into your lesson plans.
steps: Discover activities filtered by specific skills or engagement types.
Expand any card to view detailed, step-by-step implementation guides.
Save your top picks to the side panel for quick reference anytime.
Directly export activity steps into your digital lesson planners.

guide.short: Design and host professional Bingo sessions for vocabulary and concept review.
steps: Input your vocabulary words in the streamlined setup interface.
Generate beautiful cards ready for high-quality printing or digital play.
Launch 'Caller Mode' to randomly draw and track words for the whole class.

guide.short: A high-stakes memory matching game to reinforce vocabulary recognition.
steps: Set up custom word or image pairs in the configuration menu.
Flip tiles to discover matching pairs while the clock ticks.
Master the board by remembering positions to achieve the high score.

guide.short: Create stunning, ready-to-print flashcards with customizable layouts.
steps: Choose your preferred grid density for optimal paper usage.
Personalize with high-res images or crisp vocabulary text.
Match your classroom aesthetic with curated theme colors and fonts.
Print to A4 with professional-grade cutting guides for easy prep.

guide.short: Boost classroom morale by tracking positive behaviors and participation.
steps: Sync your student roster instantly from the settings panel.
Award Stars for participation or issue soft Warnings for redirection.
Monitor engagement trends to provide data-driven feedback.

guide.short: Keep your lessons on track with a multi-functional clock and timer suite.
steps: Toggle between analog/digital clocks, timers, and stopwatches.
Set precise durations for activities to maintain lesson momentum.
Use Full Screen mode for maximum classroom visibility and focus.

guide.short: A classic vertical strategy showdown for two competing teams.
steps: Divide your class into Team Pink and Team Green for a head-to-head battle.
Teams take turns strategically dropping pieces into the vertical grid.
The first team to align four pieces—horizontally, vertically, or diagonally—claims victory.

guide.short: Instantly generate and solve professional crossword puzzles for any topic.
steps: Input your target vocabulary and clues into the smart editor.
Watch the engine auto-generate a perfectly balanced puzzle grid.
Challenge students to solve digitally or print for a classroom activity.

guide.short: Guide students through transitions with clear, visual downtime instructions.
steps: Select the appropriate transition activity from the bottom control panel.
Display large, friendly icons to keep young learners on task.
Signal the start of the next lesson phase with the 'Ready' indicator.

guide.short: Create custom Cloze-test style challenges to reinforce sentence structure.
steps: Input your sentences and select which words to hide in the settings.
Save your custom set and launch the interactive game mode.
Challenge students to fill the gaps and test their grammar proficiency.

guide.short: A modern take on flashcards for high-speed vocabulary review.
steps: Build your deck with custom front/back word and image pairs.
Click any card for a smooth flip animation and reveal the answer.
Shuffle the deck to keep students on their toes during review sessions.

guide.short: Perfect for brain breaks: a rhythm-based movement challenge.
steps: Launch the built-in player to start the high-energy music.
Encourage students to dance and move while the beat is active.
Watch for the music to cut—all students must 'Freeze' instantly!

guide.short: A visual logic game where students decode phrases from emoji sequences.
steps: Analyze the displayed emoji sequence for semantic clues.
Brainstorm the phrase, idiom, or vocabulary word represented.
Enter the answer to receive instant feedback and unlock the next level.

guide.short: Sharpen deductive reasoning and descriptive English in this classic battle.
steps: Secretly select your target character from the diverse digital grid.
Ask strategic Yes/No questions about physical traits and attributes.
Eliminate candidates by flipping cards until only the target remains.
Announce your final deduction to claim the win!

guide.short: A classic race against time to rescue the word through spelling.
steps: Secretly enter a target word or phrase for the class to guess.
Students take turns calling out letters to fill the blanks.
Successfully spell the word before the gallows are completed!

guide.short: A fast-paced verbal challenge where students describe words under pressure.
steps: Place one student in the 'Hot Seat' facing away from the screen.
The class provides creative verbal clues without saying the target word.
The seated student must synthesize the clues to guess the word correctly.

guide.short: A classic test of focus and visual tracking.
steps: Lock your eyes on the ball before the cups begin to move.
Track the cups as they shuffle at increasing speeds.
Identify the correct cup to reveal the hidden ball and win.

guide.short: A rhythm and memory battle that tests focus and pattern recognition.
steps: Watch and listen closely as the block sequence lights up.
Replicate the pattern perfectly by clicking the correct colored pads.
Customize with vocabulary in Setup to add a linguistic layer to the game.

guide.short: A high-speed memorization challenge for vocabulary and image sets.
steps: Input a set of target cards featuring words or vivid images.
Display the cards briefly, giving students a window to memorize the set.
Hide the cards and challenge students to recall every item from the deck.

guide.short: A streamlined digital notebook for drafting and archiving your lesson plans.
steps: Draft your lesson notes and pedagogical ideas in the rich text editor.
Enjoy peace of mind with automatic browser-side persistence.
Access and edit your archive anytime to refine your teaching flow.

guide.short: A digital gallery for displaying vocabulary banks and high-quality posters.
steps: Organize and curate vocabulary decks for different teaching units.
Upload and showcase educational posters in stunning high quality.
Enable Focus Mode for a distraction-free, immersive visual experience.

guide.short: Design custom educational posters with modular, easy-to-use templates.
steps: Select from a variety of layout modules to structure your information.
Edit content and styling to match your specific lesson objectives.
Print or save your custom creations for physical or digital display.

guide.short: A high-stakes block selection game that turns quizzes into a tactical battle.
steps: Enter Edit Mode to populate the blocks with your custom questions.
Students choose blocks strategically and race against the 15-second clock.
Track scores in real-time to see which team masters the block grid.

guide.short: The ultimate tool for building and hosting epic classroom quiz battles.
steps: Enter SETUP to build from scratch or load premium quiz collections.
Configure challenging questions with multiple choice or open answers.
Initiate the 'Classroom Battle' and let students compete for the top spot.
Reveal answers with dramatic flair using the integrated feedback tools.

guide.short: Build anticipation and vocabulary recognition through gradual image reveal.
steps: Upload a custom mystery image or select from our curated sets.
Click tiles one by one to reveal glimpses of the hidden picture.
Students race to identify the image as the visual clues unfold.

guide.short: Transform sentence building into a high-speed dice challenge.
steps: Roll the digital dice to generate a random challenge number.
Students must execute the corresponding linguistic task instantly.
Pass the device to keep the sentence-building momentum flowing.

guide.short: A professional scoreboard for tracking points across multiple teams.
steps: Register your teams through the simplified entry interface.
Update scores instantly with large, tactile touch controls.
Reset or archive scores to mark the end of an epic session.

guide.short: Generate instantly scrambled word puzzles to challenge spelling accuracy.
steps: Input your target vocabulary word into the scrambler.
Display the mixed-up letter sequence on the big screen.
Students compete to decode and spell the original word correctly.

guide.short: Engage students with secret messages and cryptographic puzzles.
steps: Draft your secret message using the secure encoding tool.
Present the generated cipher key to your class of cryptographers.
Watch students apply logic and spelling to decode the hidden text.

guide.short: A tactile approach to mastering syntax and sentence construction.
steps: Input any sentence to be broken down and shuffled.
Watch as the system randomizes word positions for the challenge.
Students drag and drop blocks to restore perfect grammatical order.

guide.short: Build and present sleek, text-based slides with a streamlined workflow.
steps: Input your presentation content using our intuitive syntax.
Use the ':' separator to instantly create new slide breaks.
Launch Full Screen mode for a professional, high-impact presentation.

guide.short: A comprehensive digital dictionary for exploring and collecting vocabulary.
steps: Search for any word to discover precise definitions and audio pronunciation.
Save your favorite words to a personalized digital collection.
Utilize Teacher Tools to instantly sync category-specific word sets.

guide.short: Convert simple lists into professional presentations in a single click.
steps: Enter your text separated by lines or semicolons for instant slide generation.
Choose between sequential or randomized shuffle-play modes.
Navigate your deck seamlessly using touch or keyboard controls.

guide.short: An interactive spelling environment for young learners and phonics practice.
steps: Configure your custom word list in the settings dashboard.
Securely save your lists for recurring classroom use.
Students interactively select letters to assemble words correctly.

guide.short: A beautifully animated wheel for making random selections in style.
steps: Easily customize segments with text or vibrant colors.
Spin the wheel with a satisfying click or swipe animation.
Perfect for choosing students, prizes, or next activity steps.

guide.short: A digital take on the classic category race for vocabulary mastery.
steps: Define your target categories to match your current unit.
Launch the letter spinner to determine the round's starting letter.
Students race against the customizable timer to populate categories.
Review and score unique words for an ultimate vocab showdown.

guide.short: Ignite imagination with a digital dice set that generates unique story prompts.
steps: Roll the story dice to reveal a random set of evocative icons.
Students use the icons as the core elements of a creative narrative.
Encourage complex storytelling by requiring all icons to be integrated.

guide.short: Challenge students to reconstruct scrambled narratives through logic and context.
steps: Input a complete story or set of instructions into the editor.
Watch the system break and shuffle the narrative into random segments.
Students drag and drop blocks to restore the logical flow of the story.

guide.short: Fairly and randomly assign classroom roles and tasks to your students.
steps: Input your current student roster or select a saved class.
List the roles or tasks that need to be filled for the session.
Click Assign to instantly and fairly pair students with their new roles.

guide.short: Break the ice and randomize teams with a professional group generator.
steps: Paste your student list or use a pre-saved class roster.
Specify the number of teams or students per group needed.
Launch the picker to generate balanced, randomized team lists.

guide.short: A high-movement icebreaker that gets students moving and speaking.
steps: Present two contrasting options or opinions to the whole class.
Students physically move to different sides of the room to cast their vote.
Facilitate a mini-debate where students justify their chosen side.

guide.short: A clean, digital version of the classic strategic alignment game.
steps: Select your preferred grid size for a short or extended match.
Players take turns placing their unique marks on the digital board.
Achieve a straight line of marks to claim victory in this logic battle.

guide.short: A thrilling game of undercover roles and linguistic deception.
steps: Set up the player count and distribute secret roles digitally.
Students secretly reveal their word and prepare their one-sentence clue.
Engage in rounds of debate and voting to identify the 'Undercover' student.
Victory depends on the 'Impostors' blending in or the class spotting the lies.

guide.short: Test and improve spelling accuracy with high-speed unscrambling rounds.
steps: Build a custom list of target vocabulary for the round.
Watch as words appear in a complex, randomized scrambled state.
Students race to type the correct spelling and clear the board.

guide.short: A professional digital canvas for sketching, explaining, and brainstorming.
steps: Select from a curated palette of vibrant colors and brush sizes.
Use the undo/redo controls to refine your drawings in real-time.
Clear the board instantly with the one-tap trash control for a fresh start.

guide.short: Rapid-fire vocabulary display for high-intensity reading practice.
steps: Paste or type your word bank into the animator engine.
Words flash across the screen at a customizable tempo.
Use for automated flashcard drills or 'speed reading' challenges.

guide.short: A sleek, digital list for making fair and random selections instantly.
steps: Input your list of students, vocabulary, or classroom items.
Launch the generator to pick a random item with elegant animation.
Ensure total fairness in participation and activity selection.

guide.short: A high-pressure vocabulary game where every second counts.
steps: Select a unit category and set the aggressive turn timer.
Students must call out a matching word and tap the letter to stop their clock.
The last student standing before the timer hits zero wins the round.

guide.short: Test student logic by sorting vocabulary into their correct semantic zones.
steps: Launch the game to reveal the scrambled word bank.
Drag and drop words into their corresponding category columns.
Check accuracy instantly to reinforce correct linguistic grouping.

guide.short: Generate custom, high-density word search puzzles for your classroom.
steps: Input your target vocabulary set into the generator.
Watch as the system hides your words within a complex letter grid.
Students use the digital highlighter to find and claim words.

guide.short: A powerful suite of utilities for transforming and analyzing educational text.
steps: Choose from a selection of specialized text transformation tools.
Paste your raw content into the high-performance editor.
Apply smart filters to extract keywords, clean formatting, or analyze sentiment.

guide.short: A professional lab for prepping and optimizing classroom visual assets.
steps: Select an image tool from our curated workshop catalog.
Upload or drag-and-drop your visual assets for instant processing.
Apply professional filters, cropping, and optimizations with ease.

guide.short: Generate highly personalized, professional progress comments in seconds.
steps: Select a student and input their performance data across key metrics.
Customize pronouns and tone to match your school's reporting style.
Click Generate to produce a polished, ready-to-use pedagogical comment.

guide.short: An intelligent framework for building comprehensive end-of-term student reports.
steps: Follow the guided architect through each specific skill category.
Select from a curated library of professional, level-appropriate comments.
Review and refine the compiled report before final export.

guide.short: Automatically extract core vocabulary and grammar from any lesson plan text.
steps: Paste your raw lesson plan or unit text into the smart parser.
Select the specific items you wish to extract and organize.
Seamlessly export your curated content directly into other KlassKit games.

guide.short: Track unit readiness and planning status across all your scheduled classes.
steps: Get a birds-eye view of your weekly schedule and planning progress.
Monitor unit readiness and lesson status for every class at a glance.
Manage administrative deadlines and sync data automatically.

guide.short: Build and host a professional library of YouTube resources for your lessons.
steps: Add videos via URL or ID to your dedicated classroom library.
Organize your collection for instant, distraction-free playback.
Manage your resources by archiving or updating unit-specific videos.

guide.short: A revolutionary way to visualize classroom data, currently in early access development.
steps: Experience the future of classroom management in our exclusive beta phase.
Help shape the final product with developer-only testing and feedback.

guide.short: A major overhaul of our recipe and lesson-building engine, coming soon.
steps: Early access testing for our next-generation OS architecture.
Iterating on new UI patterns and performance optimizations.

guide.short: A high-stakes narrative deduction game currently in active development.
steps: Participate in early playtesting of our most complex logic game yet.
Balancing mechanics and narrative flow in this developer-only preview.

guide.short: The future of in-app classroom messaging and roleplay, in early access.
steps: Testing secure, real-time communication protocols for the classroom.
Building the foundation for interactive, messenger-based roleplay.

guide.short: A high-speed labeling race for the whole school, currently in development.
steps: Testing large-scale asset management and real-time racing mechanics.
Optimizing for classroom and hallway environments.

guide.short: A comprehensive cloud-synced library for all your teaching assets, coming soon.
steps: Developing the core asset indexing and cloud-sync engine.
Refining the search and categorization UX for a seamless experience.

guide.short: A data-driven approach to professional classroom observation, in development.
steps: Building intelligent templates for qualitative and quantitative feedback.
Ensuring total security and ease-of-use for peer observations.

guide.short: Our most advanced puzzle generation engine yet, currently in early access.
steps: Expanding support for complex puzzle types and cross-unit generation.
Optimizing the layout engine for high-density printable grids.

guide.short: A high-performance randomizer for deck-based classroom games, in development.
steps: Developing the core physics and randomization logic for smooth shuffling.
Adding support for custom image decks and unit-specific assets.

guide.short: A team-based competitive twist on the classic Hangman, coming soon.
steps: Balancing team mechanics and scoring systems for large groups.
Refining the visual feedback for high-stakes classroom battles.

guide.short: A granular, data-driven skill tracking system for every student, in development.
steps: Defining the core competency matrix and progress visualization.
Ensuring seamless integration with the main KlassKit dashboard.

guide.short: An immersive journey through English tenses and syntax, coming soon.
steps: Building the 'Diver' mechanics to represent grammatical complexity.
Developing a rich library of examples for all major English tenses.
